result:
`make` completed with exit code 0 and `redis-server` was freshly rebuilt (timestamped just now).

Summary of changes:
- Added `kvobj *lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(robj *key, client *c, robj *reply)` in `src/db.c` (same body as the old function, key-first parameter order) and its declaration in `src/server.h`.
- Migrated all 36 call sites across `src/bitops.c`, `src/geo.c`, `src/t_array.c`, `src/t_hash.c`, `src/t_list.c`, `src/t_set.c`, `src/t_stream.c`, `src/t_string.c`, `src/t_zset.c` to the new function with swapped argument order.
- Removed the old `lookupKeyReadOrReply` declaration/definition; confirmed no residual references to the old name anywhere in the repo.
- Full `make` build passes clean.
